name: Market Intelligence Digest
description: Turn a stack of raw market articles, price feeds, or analyst notes into a sourced, decision-ready market digest — clustered by theme, cited, and closing with a headline and a watch list for next period.
author: accilium

variables.name: RAW_SOURCES
variables.description: The pasted articles, analyst notes, or price data, each ideally with a publication/source name and date.
variables.example: Reuters, 2026-07-08: Brent crude up 4% on OPEC+ supply signal. Platts, 2026-07-10: European gas storage 68% full, ahead of 5-year average...

variables.name: FOCUS
variables.description: The market, commodity, or topic of interest, and why the business cares about it.
variables.example: Gas and oil price trends — the holding hedges energy costs quarterly and needs early warning of sustained price moves

variables.name: PERIOD
variables.description: The reporting period this digest covers.

example_input: RAW_SOURCES: 5 news clippings on gas/oil prices; FOCUS: energy cost hedging; PERIOD: July 2026
